design_patterns/src/main/java/com/ak/lea.general_idea: Removed unused imports for ArrayList and List to clean up the source file.
Changed TV instance retrieval from a method call to a static field access, implying a refactor in the TV class.
Changed command field types from concrete classes to the Command interface to adhere to programming to an interface.
design_patterns/src/main/java/com/ak/lea.human_impl: private VolumeUpCommand volumeUpCommand -> private Command volumeUpCommand

design_patterns/src/main/java/com/ak/lea.general_idea: Added an explicit cast to NavigateChannelCommand to access the specific setChannel method not present in the Command interface.
Refactor the class-based singleton implementation to use the enum-based singleton pattern for better serialization and reflection safety.
design_patterns/src/main/java/com/ak/lea.human_impl: Replaced `public final class TV` with static instance field and `getInstance()` method with `public enum TV { INSTANCE; }`.

design_patterns/pom.xml.general_idea: Set the maven compiler source level to Java 21 to enable compilation with the new JDK.
Set the maven compiler target bytecode version to Java 21 to ensure runtime compatibility.

.gitignore.general_idea: Ignore Eclipse-specific project metadata and configuration files to keep the repository clean.
Ignore JVM crash heap dumps generated during runtime errors.
